decisions.series_shape: occasion.series = { label, rungs: [{ years, title, prompts? }] }; rung.prompts optional, falls back to occasion.prompts
decisions.series_scope: two ladders: child birthdays (per-rung prompts) + anniversaries (shared prompts)
decisions.anniversary_default_rungs: [1,5,10,15,20,25] not the literal 25 (author flagged, data-only reversible)
decisions.dates: wizard collects one anchor date; each rung openOn = anchor + years, editable per rung, rung removable
decisions.zip: N separate self-contained tessera-<ID>.zip downloads (no family-zip container) — author settled 2026-07-12
decisions.state: 'series' draft slot via setDraft/getDraft; NO migrate() bump
decisions.seal: loop existing TesseraExport.seal per rung in date order — one seal path preserved
decisions.print: add printKits(sealedList) to print.js (concat kitSheets -> show); presentation-only, not a format event

chunks.notes: DONE. decisions.md entry + occasions.js series data. child-years occasion added (per-rung prompts 5/10/15/18) + series on anniversary (shared prompts, rungs 1/5/10/15/20/25). prose-check clean (only pre-existing header WARN); all 6 suites green. Idempotent: series field present on child-years + anniversary occasions.

DONE. printKits(sealedList, opts) added + exported in TesseraPrint api. Sorts by openOn, concatenates kitSheets, one show(). node --check clean; all 6 suites green. Idempotent: printKits present in TesseraPrint api.

landing.js: series state fields + entry offer after occasion step + wizard overlay scaffold + anchor-date -> prefilled editable/removable rung date list. Verify: node --check landing/landing.js. Idempotent: series state + #series-* elements present.

landing.js: per-rung compose screens + running sidebar + series seal loop (N seal/download/registry rows date-ordered) + one print job via printKits + 'series' draft slot autosave/restore. Verify: node --check landing/landing.js. Idempotent: sealSeries() present.

QA: browser walkthrough at 375px (3-letter series => 3 zips, 3 registry rows, one print job, per-letter footers), fixture verify, PROGRESS.md update, spec-sync check clean. Idempotent: PROGRESS.md marks Task 3 done.

resume_hint: Start c1-data: add series design entry to docs/decisions.md, then add series data to data/occasions.js (new child-years occasion with per-rung prompts via /occasion; add series to existing anniversary occasion, shared prompts). Then c2..c5 in order.
